note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. Champion & best-player probabilities are refreshed daily; knockout fixtures with undecided opponents are filled in manually as groups conclude.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。冠军与最佳球员概率每日更新；对手未定的淘汰赛对阵将在小组赛结束后手动补全。

champions.reason_en: Sole favourite after a sharp 3–1 over Senegal; elite spine + Mbappé ceiling.
champions.reason_zh: 3–1 完胜塞内加尔后成为唯一大热；中轴线顶级，姆巴佩上限极高。

champions.reason_en: Best football on paper, but a shock opening draw vs Cape Verde dents the aura.
champions.reason_zh: 纸面打法最强，但首战意外被佛得角逼平，气场受挫。

champions.reason_en: Deepest squad in the tournament; the question is nerve, not talent.
champions.reason_zh: 阵容厚度全场最佳；问题在心态，而非天赋。

champions.reason_en: Top non-European; attack can win any game, defence is the swing factor.
champions.reason_zh: 非欧最强；锋线能赢下任何比赛，后防是胜负手。

champions.reason_en: Holders' core intact, opened 3–0; tournament know-how is real edge.
champions.reason_zh: 卫冕核心仍在，首战 3–0；大赛经验是实打实的优势。

champions.reason_en: Loaded midfield + wings; finishing consistency is the swing.
champions.reason_zh: 中场与边路星光熠熠；把握机会的稳定性是关键。

champions.reason_en: Rebuilt and dangerous, but the back line can be exposed by pace.
champions.reason_zh: 重建后颇具威胁，但后防易被速度打穿。

champions.reason_en: Balanced and well-coached; lacks a single match-winner up top.
champions.reason_zh: 均衡且调教有方；锋线缺一个能单点改变比赛的人。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Penalties + pace + a France side built to feed him; the safe favourite.
players.reason_zh: 点球+速度+全队为他输送，金靴最稳的热门。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain's creator-finisher; volume of chances is unmatched if they click.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙的创造兼终结点；若球队转起来，机会量无人能及。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: Pure penalty-box efficiency + set-piece threat; needs England to go deep.
players.reason_zh: 禁区效率+定位球威胁；需要英格兰走得足够远。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Most ruthless finisher alive; capped only by how far Norway advances.
players.reason_zh: 当世最冷血的终结者；天花板取决于挪威能走多远。

players.name: Vinícius Júnior
players.reason_en: Game-breaker on the left; output swings with Brazil's structure.
players.reason_zh: 左路的撕裂者；产量随巴西体系起伏。

players.name: Julián Álvarez
players.reason_en: Relentless movement + a team that wins knockout games.
players.reason_zh: 不知疲倦的跑动+一支擅打淘汰赛的球队。

fixtures.reason_en: Class gap is wide; Portugal control and finish.
fixtures.reason_zh: 实力差距明显，葡萄牙掌控并取胜。

fixtures.reason_en: England's depth edges an aging-but-clever Croatia midfield.
fixtures.reason_zh: 英格兰厚度略胜老练但渐老的克罗地亚中场。

fixtures.reason_en: Ghana's athleticism and ceiling tilt a close one.
fixtures.reason_zh: 加纳的身体与上限在胶着中占优。

fixtures.reason_en: Colombia's quality should travel; debutants under pressure.
fixtures.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚质量更高；初登世界杯者承压。

fixtures.reason_en: Set-piece and physical edge to Czechia in a tight match.
fixtures.reason_zh: 定位球与对抗优势令捷克在紧绷比赛中略胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Swiss tournament solidity over Bosnia's boom-or-bust.
fixtures.reason_zh: 瑞士的大赛稳健胜过波黑的大起大落。

fixtures.reason_en: Co-hosts' pace and home crowd carry it.
fixtures.reason_zh: 东道主的速度与主场氛围占优。

fixtures.reason_en: Coin-flip; home altitude and crowd nudge Mexico.
fixtures.reason_zh: 五五开；主场海拔与氛围让墨西哥略占先。

fixtures.reason_en: Co-hosts with more attacking talent than the Socceroos.
fixtures.reason_zh: 东道主进攻天赋多于澳大利亚。

fixtures.reason_en: Morocco's 2022 semi core is a level above.
fixtures.reason_zh: 摩洛哥 2022 四强班底高出一档。

fixtures.reason_en: Mismatch; Brazil's attack runs up the score.
fixtures.reason_zh: 实力悬殊；巴西锋线大举得分。

fixtures.reason_en: Opponents undecided — pick locks once the bracket is set.
fixtures.reason_zh: 对手未定——对阵确定后再开放竞猜。

fixtures.reason_en: Opponents undecided — pick locks once the bracket is set.
fixtures.reason_zh: 对手未定——对阵确定后再开放竞猜。
